problem_summary: GenAI wellness companion for high-stakes exam prep stress relief, mood monitoring, trigger tracking, and crisis safety bypass.

activity.msg: Booted team and verified 4/4 MCP servers responding.
Generated SPEC with 6 competitor deep-dives.
Decision received: Sticking to Next.js + Supabase; direct Groq LLM architecture with strict wellness limits.
Generated PLAN (DDL, folder layout) & API_CONTRACT (/api/logs, /api/chat).
Scaffolding dashboard.html and state.json. Starting local progress dashboard server.
Wrote PostgreSQL schema.sql and Supabase wrapper with local cache.
Completed /api/logs and /api/chat Next.js API endpoints.
Completed responsive dark theme client pages and charts.
Compiled successfully. Verified AC1, AC2, AC3 and created TESTING.md.
Created pitch.md walkthrough & updated README.md instructions.
Committed all workspace changes locally to git repository.
Created public GitHub repository and pushed main branch successfully.
Build successfully signed off and declared shipped!
Localized Groq prompts for NIMHANS, MoHFW, Tele-MANAS, and Rupees (₹).
Committed & pushed version 0.0.1 release base to remote main branch.
Implemented PII scrubbing (emails, phone numbers, names intro) & 'Wipe My Data' API.
Added Wellness Passkey Backup & Restore and Data Purge buttons.
Committed and successfully pushed version 0.0.2 with security and localization updates to remote repository.
Added secure signup & login portal with local storage session persistence.
Successfully verified all 6 acceptance criteria and updated functional tests.
Increased acceptance criteria from 3 to 6 on agent dashboard.
Committed and pushed version 0.0.3 with auth & updated dashboard criteria.

commits.msg: feat: add secure signup & login portal and increase dashboard criteria to 6
feat: implement PII scrubbing, 'Wipe My Data' API, and Anonymous Passkey Backup & Restore
feat: localize Groq prompts & mock responses for Indian student exam context
feat: complete initial implementation of MindGuard student wellness tracker
